---
title: Survival Analysis
description: "Time-to-event methods: Kaplan-Meier estimation, log-rank tests, Cox proportional hazards, and competing risks"
---

Survival analysis studies the time until an event of interest occurs -- death, disease recurrence, mechanical failure, customer churn. It differs from ordinary regression in a single crucial respect: observations may be censored, meaning the event has not occurred by the end of follow-up, and this partial information must be used without bias.

This area walks through the special definitions survival analysis requires (hazard, survival, cumulative hazard), the non-parametric methods that estimate them (Kaplan-Meier, Nelson-Aalen), and the regression models that relate them to covariates (Cox proportional hazards, accelerated failure time, flexible parametric models).

## Topics

- Censoring types: right, left, interval; informative vs. non-informative censoring
- The hazard function, cumulative hazard, and survival function, and the mathematical relationships between them
- Kaplan-Meier estimation with pointwise and simultaneous confidence bands
- The log-rank test and its weighted variants (Peto-Peto, Tarone-Ware, Fleming-Harrington)
- Cox proportional hazards regression: partial likelihood, hazard ratios, interpretation
- Checking proportional hazards: Schoenfeld residuals, interaction with time
- Time-varying covariates and time-dependent coefficients
- Accelerated failure time (AFT) models with exponential, Weibull, log-normal, log-logistic distributions
- Flexible parametric models (Royston-Parmar) via restricted cubic splines on the log-hazard
- Competing risks: cumulative incidence functions, Fine-Gray subdistribution hazards
- Frailty models for clustered or recurrent event data
- Landmark analysis and multi-state models

Packages: `survival`, `survminer`, `cmprsk`, `flexsurv`, `rms`, `riskRegression`, `mstate`.

<!-- card-grid-injected -->

## Tutorials

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Accelerated Failure Time Models](accelerated-failure-time.qmd)
Parametric survival regression on the log-time scale with acceleration-factor interpretation
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Censoring Types](censoring-types.qmd)
Right, left, interval, and informative censoring in time-to-event data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Checking Cox Assumptions](cox-assumptions-check.qmd)
Diagnostics for proportional hazards, functional form, and influential observations
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Competing Risks: Cumulative Incidence](competing-risks-cif.qmd)
Estimating the probability of each event type in the presence of competing risks
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Concordance and the C-Index](concordance-c-index.qmd)
Discrimination ability of a survival model measured by concordance probability
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Conditional Survival](conditional-survival.qmd)
Updating prognosis for survivors: P(T > t + s | T > s)
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Cox Proportional Hazards Regression](cox-proportional-hazards.qmd)
Semi-parametric regression for survival data with arbitrary baseline hazard
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Fine-Gray Subdistribution Hazards](fine-gray-regression.qmd)
Regression directly targeting cumulative incidence in competing-risks data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Frailty Models](frailty-models.qmd)
Random effects in survival: unobserved heterogeneity and clustered survival data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Hazard, Survival, and Cumulative Hazard](hazard-survival-cumulative.qmd)
The three equivalent representations of a time-to-event distribution
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Interval-Censored Data](interval-censored-data.qmd)
Events known to occur within a time interval, not at an exact time
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Joint Longitudinal-Survival Models](joint-longitudinal-survival.qmd)
Simultaneously modelling a longitudinal biomarker and time-to-event outcome
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Kaplan-Meier Estimation](kaplan-meier.qmd)
Non-parametric estimation of the survival function from right-censored data, with confidence intervals and group comparisons
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Landmark Analysis](landmark-analysis.qmd)
Conditioning on survival to a landmark time to analyse time-varying covariates
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Left Truncation](left-truncation.qmd)
Delayed entry: subjects only enter the study after surviving to a certain age or time
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Log-Rank Test: Details](log-rank-test-details.qmd)
Weighted and stratified log-rank test for comparing survival across groups
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Multi-State Models](multi-state-models.qmd)
Modelling transitions between discrete states over time
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Parametric Survival: Log-Normal](parametric-survival-lognormal.qmd)
Log-normal AFT model for non-monotone hazards
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Parametric Survival: Weibull](parametric-survival-weibull.qmd)
Fitting Weibull regression in both PH and AFT parameterisations
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Recurrent Events](recurrent-events.qmd)
Modelling repeated events per subject: Andersen-Gill, PWP, and frailty approaches
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST)](restricted-mean-survival-time.qmd)
Alternative summary robust to non-proportional hazards and censoring
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Royston-Parmar Flexible Parametric Models](flexible-parametric-royston-parmar.qmd)
Splines on the log-cumulative-hazard for flexible baseline without leaving parametric modelling
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Schoenfeld Residuals](schoenfeld-residuals.qmd)
Residuals that test the proportional-hazards assumption in Cox regression
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Simulating Survival Data](survival-simulation.qmd)
Generating realistic censored time-to-event datasets for power analysis and method validation
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Stratified Cox Models](stratified-cox.qmd)
Stratum-specific baseline hazards when proportional hazards fails across groups
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Brier Score for Survival](brier-score-survival.qmd)
Time-dependent prediction loss combining calibration and discrimination
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Nelson-Aalen Estimator](nelson-aalen-estimator.qmd)
Non-parametric estimator of the cumulative hazard under right-censoring
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Time-Dependent ROC](time-dependent-roc.qmd)
ROC curves and AUC evaluated at specific follow-up times for survival predictions
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Time-Varying Covariates](time-varying-covariates.qmd)
Covariates whose value changes during follow-up: counting-process data layout
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Weighted Log-Rank Tests](weighted-log-rank.qmd)
Peto-Peto, Fleming-Harrington, and other weighted variants for non-proportional hazards
:::

:::
